_schema_notes.coverage: Authoritative schema for all DID formats — DD Form 1664 (pre-2014) and free-text (post-2014 MIL-STD-963C)
_schema_notes.did_format: Set to 'dd_form_1664' or 'free_text'. Determines which fields are expected to be populated.
_schema_notes.963c_compliant: True if the DID was prepared under MIL-STD-963C (2014 or later). False for older DIDs.
_schema_notes.reserved_fields: Fields marked RESERVED are present in one format but not the other. Always include them — set to empty string or empty array when not applicable.
_schema_notes.preparation_instructions: Official MIL-STD-963C name for what was previously called 'requirements'. Contains the numbered sections of the DID. All section numbers are normalized to strictly numeric dot-notation (1, 1.1, 1.1.1). Letter-based source numbering (2.a, 3.1.b) is converted to numeric equivalents (2.1, 3.1.2).
_schema_notes.asterisk: True if the requirement number is followed by * in the source document (conditional requirement).

title: Technical WORK Breakdown Structure (TWBS) AND Technology Maturation PLAN (TMP)
summary: This DID outlines requirements for a Technical Work Breakdown Structure (TWBS) and Technology Maturation Plan (TMP), detailing system design, critical technology element maturity, and maturation roadmaps to assess technology readiness levels.
use_relationship:
The Technical Work Breakdown Structure (TWBS) details the threshold compliant system design down to its lowest level of indenture appropriate for identifying and determining the maturity of Critical Technology Elements (CTEs). The Technology Maturation Plan (TMP) details the program's technology maturation roadmaps for each CTE to achieve Technology Readiness Levels (TRLs) and the targeted maturity consistent with program acquisition strategy.
The Independent Technical Review Office (ITRO), along with an independent expert panel, shall use the TWBS and TMP to assess technology maturity and gauge risk to achieve TRLs by key acquisition knowledge points.
This Data Item Description (DID) contains the format, content, and intended use information for the data deliverable resulting from the work task described in the solicitation.
distribution_statement: DISTRIBUTION STATEMENT A: Approved for public release; distribution is unlimited.

preparation_instructions.title: Reference documents.
preparation_instructions.content:
The applicable issue of the documents cited herein, including their approval dates and dates of any applicable amendments, notices, and revisions, shall be as specified in the contract. NAVAIRINST 3910.1 Technology Readiness Assessment Process
This reference document establishes policy and guidance which outlines procedures and assigned responsibilities for the technology readiness assessment process.

preparation_instructions.title: Format.
preparation_instructions.content: The TWBS and TMP shall be in the NAVAIR's ITRO approved format.

preparation_instructions.title: Content.
preparation_instructions.content: The TWBS and TMP shall contain the following data elements: Program background information, program level risks, technology related risks, relevant environment description, operational environment description, technology element description, enabling technology, change description, CTE/non-CTE justification, predicted TRL, TRL justification, and demonstration details for CTE maturation (e.g. prototyping, demonstrations, modeling and simulation, leveraged investments in maturity, etc.).
